exclusion: Content farms and SEO-optimized summary sites.
Press releases without attribution or date.
inclusion: Analyst reports from named banks / research firms with disclosure.
Company press releases (with explicit provenance tag).
Named business-news articles (Reuters, Bloomberg, FT, WSJ).
Named industry-analyst commentary (Gartner, Forrester, ICER, etc.).
Peer-reviewed journal articles on the technology / mechanism.
Regulatory correspondence (FDA CRLs, FTC second requests, DOJ filings).

expected_tier_distribution.rationale: Regulatory filings (SEC, FDA, FTC, DOJ) and patents — primary documents of record.
Named industry-analyst reports with disclosed methodology and company press releases.
Peer-reviewed research on the technology or mechanism.
Named business-news articles and attributed commentary.
Narrative industry reviews and white papers.

research_question: What is Novo Nordisk's competitive position in the obesity pharmaceutical market relative to Eli Lilly and newer entrants?
